testcase.name: @stynx-web/angular-storage > downloads a document through a signed URL and emits progress
@stynx-web/angular-storage > surfaces download validation and network failures
@stynx-web/angular-storage > moves through initiating, uploading, and completed states
@stynx-web/angular-storage > handles selected files, quarantine completion, and generic failures
@stynx-web/angular-storage > uploads dropped files when drag-and-drop is enabled
@stynx-web/angular-storage > emits scan-status updates after an upload completes with a pending scan
@stynx-web/angular-storage > rejects invalid files and surfaces upload failures
@stynx-web/angular-storage > calls the document API endpoints with normalized base URLs
@stynx-web/angular-storage > long-polls scan status until a terminal status is returned
@stynx-web/angular-storage > uploads files through XMLHttpRequest with progress, success, and failure paths
@stynx-web/angular-storage > delegates small files from multipart executor to the XHR executor
@stynx-web/angular-storage > uploads large files as resumable multipart chunks
